title: Account Record v1
description: Shared data model that flows through all agents. Fields are progressively enriched — null means 'not yet filled', not 'unknown'.

api_entry.description: Whether a specific API is relevant for this account, and why.

reason.description: One-line reason for relevance or exclusion

enrichment_event.description: Audit log entry — one per agent run on this record.

markets.description: All markets where the company operates (ISO2)

account_tier.description: Company size tier. 1=large incumbent (exclude from pipeline), 2=mid-market (primary), 3=scale-up (secondary). Separate from icp.score_tier.

volume.description: User scale + API call volume estimates. Filled by Market Mapper. Different APIs have different trigger events — estimates are calculated accordingly.

users_total.description: Total registered/contracted users or policyholders. e.g. '20M registrados'

users_dau_est.description: Estimated DAU (typically MAU × 0.30 for consumer apps). e.g. '~5.7M DAU (est.)'

triggers.description: Estimated trigger events per API type. These are the denominator for API call volume.

logins_per_day.description: For Number Verification + SIM Swap. Est: DAU × avg_sessions. e.g. '~6.8M/día'

sms_otp_per_day.description: Current estimated SMS OTPs fired per day (what we replace). e.g. '~2M/día'

onboardings_per_month.description: For KYC Match + Age Verification. New user registrations. e.g. '~950K/mes'

risky_txns_per_day.description: For SIM Swap. High-value or sensitive transactions. e.g. '~500K/día'

notes.description: Anything that affects volume estimates: seasonality, wallet launch, regulatory events

api_call_estimates.description: Estimated annual API calls per product. Label includes basis. e.g. '~730M calls/año (logins × 30% OTP rate × 365)'

as_of.description: Date of the base figure (YYYY-MM or YYYY)

api_fit.description: Per-API relevance assessment. Filled progressively — Market Mapper does a quick pass, Scout refines with signals.

icp.description: ICP scoring. Filled by Scout. Null until Scout has run on this record.

score_tier.description: A≥8.0, B 6.0-7.9, C<6.0. Never confuse with account_tier.

outreach.description: Analyst output. Null until Analyst has run.

angle.description: Primary outreach angle for this account

demo.description: Demo Builder output. Null until Demo Builder has run.

created_by.description: Agent or user that created the record. e.g. 'market-mapper', 'analyst', 'manual'

origin.description: bulk = created from a Market Mapper run. on_demand = triggered by a specific company input. manual = added by hand.

enrichments.description: Ordered audit log of all agent runs on this record.
